title: Bitcoin bids farewell to CME futures gaps with $67K still on the radar
summary: Bitcoin approached the final week of CME futures gaps with several still open, providing potential BTC price targets as low as $67,000.

title: XRP drops to 16-week lows: Can price fall below $1?
summary: XRP breaks key support at $1.30 as bearish technical setups and weak investor sentiment point to a deeper correction toward $0.63.

title: Stocks and Bonds Rise After US-Iran Deal Report: Markets Wrap
summary: Hopes for a diplomatic way out of the war in Iran sent stocks toward fresh all-time highs, fading a rally in oil.

title: Bitcoin Falls Below $73,000 Despite Trump’s Crypto Capital Push
summary: Bitcoin briefly fell below $73,000 despite a fresh push from Donald Trump for the CLARITY Act, suggesting pro-crypto messaging from  Washington is losing its ability to drive gains in digital assets.

title: Prediction Market Myriad Launches $100K World Cup Competition
summary: A prize pool of over $100,000 is available for top traders and makers on prediction markets linked to FIFA World Cup matches.

title: Morning Minute: Crypto Majors Slide on Iran Escalations, ETF Outflows

title: Standard Chartered compares Ethereum to Amazon during 2001 dot-com bubble burst, says ETH will catch up to internal metrics
summary: Standard Chartered Bank has maintained its ether price targets of $4,000 by end-2026 and $40,000 by end-2030.
